triggers.name: Enemy timer: Allure of the Wild
triggers.pattern: ^You begin casting Allure of the Wild(?: [IVXLCDM]+)?\.$
triggers.comments: ~20m30s at level 50 (formula 10, cap 205 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Druid level 43. v1 keys enemy timers by spell name only — two mobs under the same spell share one bar.

triggers.name: Enemy timer cleared: Allure of the Wild
triggers.pattern: ^Your Allure of the Wild(?: [IVXLCDM]+)? spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
triggers.comments: Cancels the cast-start countdown early (mez break, mob death) and re-announces on the overlay. Overlay text only — curated packs own the spoken wear-offs.
